Okay so you guys NEED to check the last photos on this slide ✨ Before I landed in Goa for my gig, I was just casually free in the afternoon and randomly decided to go for a walk around the resort area I was staying in… little did I expect that every half kilometre I’d spot posters of myself on almost every road ❤️ Honestly, that was one of the best welcome gifts the universe and Goa could’ve given me. The gig turned out super successful… and then life got even crazier  unexpectedly met some really special friends, one night turned into morning, and somehow we didn’t sleep for the next 2 days ✨ And well… what happens in Goa, stays in Goa  Safe to say… it was one unforgettable adventure  Special thnks for making my weekend extra special- @djchetas @shubh_artsyclick @sandy_vipin and all of u ♥️♥️

No credit goes to me…… ✨ Sometimes I still can’t believe this is my life. Everything happening around me feels like a movie… like a beautiful dream I never want to wake up from  The credit goes to God  to all of you for loving me so much… and to my family, Meet Brothers ❤️ They built me, guided me, believed in me, and made me who I am today. The awards, the recognition, the love I’m getting from the industry…… it honestly feels too beautiful to be real ✨ I’m just grateful for every moment @arbaazkhanofficial @meetbrosofficial @harmeet_meetbros @meet_bros_manmeet
